subject: ProjectState architecture-input persistence
fact: Architecture input families (context, nfrs, applicationStructure, dataCompliance, technicalConstraints, openQuestions) now persist in the dedicated project_architecture_inputs table via ProjectArchitectureInputs. Canonical reads overlay that store on top of the legacy ProjectState blob in read_project_state, and new writes sync the table while stripping those keys from new blob writes. Historical rows can be backfilled with scripts/migrate_arch_inputs.py.
reason: Future state-related changes need to know that architecture inputs are no longer blob-owned, otherwise follow-up work could accidentally reintroduce raw ProjectState writes or miss the dual-read overlay.
